channel.title: NMP Status Report
channel.description: Automated engineering status audio for the nmp (Nostr Mobile Primitives) project. Hourly "Pulse" episodes and a deeper "Briefing" every four hours -- candid, technical, for the human operator.
channel.itunes:author: nmp status reporter
channel.itunes:summary: Automated engineering status audio for the nmp project: hourly Pulse episodes plus a deeper Briefing every four hours.

item.title: NMP Pulse — 2026-07-15 11:00 UTC
item.description:
Progressing -- architecture-hardening sweep clears five merges this hour on clean CI, including one data-corruption-class fix that had merged uncaught before.
USER: NIP-02 follow/unfollow now behaves identically on iOS and Android -- apps built on nmp get consistent social-graph state cross-platform, today.
DEVELOPER: nmp is still two nouns -- live queries and write intents; describe intent, the engine owns relays, subscriptions, canonical state. Newly adoptable: RelayIngestResult now embeds the canonical CommittedMutationResult instead of hand-copying its fields, so relay-ingest and local-accept share one invalidation path.
THIS HOUR -- merged: #498 (arch-review guardrails + cross-SDK parity script), #499 (Kotlin NIP-02 parity), #500 (mutation-result unification), #501 (test-relay teardown state), #497 (live-store reset guard -- the corruption fix). In review: #502 (typed FFI error taxonomy), #503 (bool-lifecycle refactors) -- both green except swift-package still pending.
VERIFIED: the #490 epic's review named this violation class after one instance merged uncaught elsewhere; all five merges ride green CI (fmt, clippy, workspace tests) plus #498's new cross-language surface governance; #501 swaps a locale-fragile string match for real closed-state truth.
PERFORMANCE: build farm spiked to 14.78 one-minute load on 8 cores (likely this session's CI); 15-min average 4.79 is more typical. Public surface holds near 29.7k of the 30k-line ceiling.
NEXT HOUR: #502's typed FFI errors and #503's bool-lifecycle types are expected to land -- unblocking the queued #491 signer/FFI cleanup burst behind them.
item.itunes:title: NMP Pulse — 2026-07-15 11:00 UTC
